title: hieracium sonchoides subsp. aracioides
intro: Hieracium sonchoides subsp. aracioides, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion-like hawkweed genus Hieracium. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and diarrhea. The health benefits of Hieracium sonchoides subsp. aracioides include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic to relieve water retention. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
